case_title: CHINESE AMERICAN CITIZENS ALLIANCE VS. STEVEN RUAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHINESE AMERICAN CITIZENS ALLIANCE (NATIONAL LODGE) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUAN, STEVEN RUAN FAMILY ASSOCIATION, A CA CORP ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 123 WAVERLY PLACE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108 (COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO), LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
